title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
